violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice machine, and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine contents voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine shut down. Establishment to send photo of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Top Round Roast, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Roast were voluntarily disposed of. Roasts were 46DF. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The floor by the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling above the deli slicer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
